SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Voice audio processing
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Route Frigate audio through the voice-call path. Many devices then apply hardware noise suppression and echo cancellation which can make speech clearer.

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Use custom User Agent
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Enable to set a custom browser User Agent string

EditTextPreference.android:title: Custom User Agent
EditTextPreference.android:summary: Browser User Agent string to use
EditTextPreference.android:defaultValue: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/118.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36

Preference.android:title: Check for Updates
Preference.android:summary: Check for new versions of the app
